title: Scale to >=4 approved sources + >=25,000 provenanced edges; refresh pipeline
context: The M4 'shipped' milestone requires >=4 approved source collections and >=25,000 provenanced edges, along with a re-runnable refresh pipeline that re-applies the license gate and re-stamps source versions. A fresh stratified accuracy audit must still achieve >=98% at this scale. The refresh pipeline enables the project to stay current as source data evolves.
objective: Integrate >=4 license-gated source collections, publish >=25,000 sourced edges with 100% provenance, implement a re-runnable refresh pipeline that re-applies the license gate and re-stamps as-of labels, and conduct a fresh stratified accuracy audit achieving >=98%.
acceptanceCriteria: >=4 source collections are integrated, each with a license gate approved entry before extraction.
>=25,000 sourced edges are published with 100% provenance.
A re-runnable refresh pipeline re-applies the license gate and re-stamps source versions ('as-of' labels) for each run.
A fresh stratified accuracy audit of the scaled dataset achieves >=98%.
All CI gates (Biolink/SHACL + provenance + allow-list) remain green at scale.
Dataset is published with per-source version labels and a changelog.
output: Updated data/ directory with the scaled multi-source graph (>=25,000 edges) in all export formats, refresh pipeline code, and a fresh accuracy audit report.
